title: Senior Financial Analyst - Cholamandalam Finance - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Cholamandalam Finance - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Cholamandalam Finance is actively seeking a talented and motivated Senior Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Pimpri-Chinchwad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Cholamandalam Finance:
Cholamandalam Finance is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in SAP FICO

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cholamandalam Finance!
